goal: Actively reinforce owned planets the no-action projection says will flip, in a pre-offense pass, so a base about to be lost is saved before offense drains its neighbours. Complements (disjoint from) the sample130 threat reserve.
change: New _defensive_reinforce_score() in main.py: masks the candidate score to reinforcement waves whose target is an owned, flip-predicted (garrison_status.owner flips within window), worth-saving (prod>=min) planet.

New pre-offense defensive greedy pass in plan_lite_waves between the reserve pass and the offensive wave pass, mirroring the existing reserve-pass pattern; decrements source_budget and removes defended targets from the offensive pass.
defense_entries added to both concat_launch_entries() returns.
Selects only EXISTING defensive candidates (does not fabricate score); gated to genuine projected losses, so no broad passivity.
Enabled in CONFIG_4P; propagates to all 4P modes. 2P unaffected (player_count<4 early return).
